name: Chrono Crisis
description:
As the "willing" testing subject of a time machine, you get sent back, really far, and your machine breaks.

Suspension of belief required: cavemen speak english.

World Building: Medium-High.

Factions: 2.

Side characters: 9.

Personality: Fleshed out, warrior, huntress.

Comments: Appreciated.
creator: KalzK
